response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/polyglot engineer with strong testing and craftsmanship habits, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and deep large-scale distributed cloud-compute platform experience. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++ infrastructure. No evidence of leading internal cloud compute platforms or formal tech-lead role at the required scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with strong testing/TDD discipline
Founder and long-term maintainer of an open-source platform (mentoring, ownership)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ minimum requirement
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infra leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring via talks/workshops
